improvement_task: Improve cost estimation for restaurants and transport; add a post-build budget reconciliation pass that trims activities until within 5% of budget.
Pass activity_types and travel_style from preferences into the cluster-to-day assignment so preferred categories are prioritised in slot selection.
Tighten opening-hours validation in ItineraryBuilder; add a pre-flight check that rejects activities outside their open window before scheduling.
Strengthen cluster-to-day assignment so build_itinerary always picks activities from the same DBSCAN cluster for a given day.
Ensure every day has at least one morning, one afternoon, and one evening slot filled; add a gap-filler pass after conflict resolution.
